stemHtml:
What must be considered when requesting a bearing or heading from a VHF direction-finding station whilst operating at low altitude in the vicinity of high terrain?

Multipath reception may..

options.a: Cause errors in the VHF voice transmissions to the aircraft.
options.b: Cause errors in the bearings displayed at the aircraft station.
options.c: Limit the line of sight range.
options.d: Cause errors in the bearings displayed at the direction&finding station.
